THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEALDE, BYRON CHEADLE, SANDRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 20 12TH STREET, #505, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, STAYED UNTIL FEB-19-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS. (NOTE: COMPUTER WOULD NOT ACCEPT THE EVICTION DATE OF FEB. 19, 1996 AS THIS IS A HOLIDAY. IN THE JUDGMENT THEREFORE, THE DATE PICKED UP BY THE COMPUTER IS FEB. 20, 1996, INSTEAD OF FEB.19/96)
